sentences.arabic: سَافَرَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلسِّيَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je putovala u novi grad radi turizma.
sentences.translationEn: The family traveled to a new city for tourism.

sentences.translation: Posjetili su stare bazare i historijske ulice.
sentences.translationEn: They visited the old markets and historical streets.

sentences.arabic: تَذَوَّقُوا أَطْعِمَةً مَحَلِّيَّةً لَذِيذَةً لَمْ يَعْرِفُوهَا مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Probali su ukusna lokalna jela koja ranije nisu poznavali.
sentences.translationEn: They tasted delicious local foods they had not known before.

sentences.translation: Vratili su se s lijepim uspomenama i puno fotografija.
sentences.translationEn: They returned with beautiful memories and many photos.
